data.title: Improving attendance in Patna with Rajesh Kumar
data.objective: Increase class attendance at Government High School
challenges: Many students like Amit Sharma and Priya Singh were absent. Parents' phone numbers like +91 9876543210 were unreachable.
actionSteps: Rajesh Kumar visited Amit's home at house number 45, Patna. Emailed the report to principal@gshpatna.org.
data.impact: Priya and Amit started coming to school regularly.
data.blurb: Rajesh visited the homes of Amit and Priya to talk to their parents.
data.content: Rajesh Kumar (email: rajesh@gmail.com, phone: 9988776655) works as a block facilitator. He tracked the absences of Amit Sharma and Priya Singh. He visited their homes in Patna and coordinated with their teacher Mrs. Anita Gupta.
